trainers.name: Spenser (21)
trainers.quote: My physical being is with POKéMON always! My heart beats as one with POKéMON always! Young one of a TRAINER! Do you believe in your POKéMON? Can you believe them through and through? If your bonds of trust are frail, you will never beat my brethren!

trainers.name: Spenser
trainers.quote: Gwahahah! You've battled your way up again? You must have developed a truly formidable bond with your POKéMON. So be it! This time, I won't bluster or hold back. This time, there's no fooling around. Ready now? Prepare to lose!
